creator: tota@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi SHIOZAKI Takehiko-san,

I have modified your patch with refering to ports/mail/mutt-devel as follows.

- Make use of grouping rules for DISTFILES and MASTER_SITES
- Use PKGNAMESUFFIX to make portlint happy
- Add OPTIONS

Please confirm it.

Thanks,

-- 
TAKATSU Tomonari
